title: anthemis rigida subsp. rigida
intro: Anthemis rigida subsp. rigida, also known as Russian chamomile, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Anthemis rigida subsp. rigida include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
